name: Zucchini Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
2. Stir in the chopped green pepper and cook for an additional minute.
3. Add the grated zucchini, grated cheddar cheese, seasoned salt, and black pepper to the skillet. Cook until the zucchini is tender and all ingredients are well combined.
4. In a large bowl, beat the eggs until they are lemon-colored and frothy.
5. Stir the cooked zucchini mixture into the beaten eggs.
6. Transfer the batter to a 2-quart ungreased casserole dish. Sprinkle the seasoned bread crumbs evenly over the top.
7. Place the dish in a preheated oven set to 375°F (190°C). Bake for approximately 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean and the edges are golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
